calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Decree
Off Calendar Jun-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN Clerk: Jacque Willis-McGhee Reporter: B. FIELDS, #7235

C/C FOR FATHER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE NAME CHANGE GRANTED ON 4/7/11; MOTHER PRESENT IN COURT, FATHER PRESENT IN COURT; PARTIES SWORN; COURT HEARS TESTIMONY & ARGUMENTS; COURT GRANTS FATHER'S MOTION AND SETS ASIDE THE NAME CHANGE; COURT SIGNS ORDER TO THAT EFFECT; COURT REFERS CASE TO FAMILY COURT FOR ANY FURTHER REQUEST FOR NAME CHANGES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

Petitioner KARINA PINA (mother) was present in pro per FOR THE MINOR DELVON DEOAUNTA FIELDS.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to KAI MALIK PINA
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
